'''âng-l-j-n''' ('''kangaljenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euphuize|euphuize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euphuize|euphuize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-l-j-n
|-
! Lemma
| kangaljenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingaljenoko|thingaljenoko]] || [[word:jingaljenoko|jingaljenoko]] || [[word:shingaljenoko|shingaljenoko]] || [[word:kingaljenoko|kingaljenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngaljenoko|thĂŠngaljenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠngaljenoko|jĂŠngaljenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠngaljenoko|shĂŠngaljenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠngaljenoko|kĂŠngaljenoko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
